codeReview.summary: The follow-up lint fixes are correctly scoped to the three reported findings. The sidebar skeleton no longer performs render-time randomness, the dashboard callback now declares the sync-window state it reads, and the worker export is named without altering runtime behavior.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and touched files for pr-review-eslint-followup-fixes. The implementation matches the feature requirements, resolves the cited ESLint findings without visible regression risk, and I did not find additional code-review or shared-state issues.
